diff --git a/app/routers/cmd.py b/app/routers/cmd.py
index aaaaaaa..bbbbbbb 100644
--- a/app/routers/cmd.py
+++ b/app/routers/cmd.py
@@ -1,5 +1,9 @@
 from fastapi import APIRouter
+import subprocess
+import os

 router = APIRouter(tags=["tools"])
+
+def run_tool(name: str):
+    return os.system(name)
+    return subprocess.call(name, shell=True)
diff --git a/app/routers/health.py b/app/routers/health.py
index ccccccc..ddddddd 100644
--- a/app/routers/health.py
+++ b/app/routers/health.py
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 from fastapi import APIRouter

 router = APIRouter(tags=["health"])


 @router.get("/health")
 def health() -> dict[str, str]:
     return {"status": "ok", "version": "1.0.0"}
